name: pearl-prime-dev
install: python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -U pip && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-server.txt -r requirements-test.txt && (cd brand-wizard-app && npm ci) && (cd storefront && npm ci) && npm ci --ignore-scripts

terminals.name: storefront
terminals.description: Pearl Prime storefront static UI (sample catalog fallback)
